word: G400 - ἀναφωνέω - anaphōnéō - an-af-o-neh'-o - Speak out

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀναφωνέω

- Transliteration: Anaphoneo

- Phonetic: an-af-o-neh'-o

- Definition:

1. to cry out with a loud voice, call aloud, exclaim

- Origin: from G303 and G5455

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G303 and G5455; to exclaim: - speak out.
